briefing.headline: Your week in geopolitics.
briefing.summary: From your lens as a investor tracking policy, the desk surfaced 8 stories that matter most to your briefing. Leading threads include: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO filing is out - Axios; Colorado Democrats censure Gov. Jared Polis over Tina Peters commutation - Colorado Public Radio. Prioritize what changes decisions you own; treat the rest as peripheral scan.
briefing.editorsNote: No single story dominated your feed; pattern recognition across your interests is the value this week.
